payload.label: dining table
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped view of a light–medium stained solid-wood dining table corner with a thick beveled top, carved apron and ornate carved legs; chairs are tucked underneath and small potted plants sit on the tabletop — close view, approximately 1.0 m from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"dining table","short_description":"light-wood dining table corner","long_description":"Partial, edge-cropped view of a light–medium stained solid-wood dining table corner with a thick beveled top, carved apron and ornate carved legs; chairs are tucked underneath and small potted plants sit on the tabletop — close view, approximately 1.0 m from the camera.","attributes":["light–medium stained wood","thick beveled tabletop","carved apron","ornate carved legs","chairs tucked underneath","potted plants on surface","polished wood grain","partial/edge-cropped"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.0}
